testimonials.understand: They understand business, not just code. That's rare in this industry.

faq.title: Questions & Answers
faq.subtitle: No unnecessary talk.
faq.a1:
WordPress: cheaper upfront, costly long-term, breaks on updates.

Custom: more upfront, cheaper to maintain, runs for years without issues.

Choice depends on budget and plans.
faq.q2: How much does a website cost in Warsaw?
faq.a2:
Business site: from 8000 PLN.

Application with business logic: from 25000 PLN.

Share details, we'll quote within 24h.
faq.q3: How long does it take to build a website?
faq.a3:
Business site: 2-4 weeks.

Online store or application: 6-12 weeks.

Depends on features and your feedback.
faq.q4: Will my site be visible on Google?
faq.a4: Yes. We write code with Google in mind — speed, structure, mobile-first, Core Web Vitals.
faq.q5: What happens after the project ends?
faq.a5: You get full documentation and source code. We also offer hosting and technical support.
